name: com.swizzlebake.timelinesmash
description: Collaborative cinematic assembly for Unity Timeline. Each artist authors isolated sub-timelines in their own files; a deterministic assembler bakes them into a native master Timeline (plus a regenerable stage scene) so teams build long, intricate cinematics together without merge conflicts. Bindings to shared scene actors live in a manifest, not in the scene.

samples.description: A minimal cinematic assembled from two contributors' sub-timelines with a shared binding manifest.
